Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The RemoveChildNodes method removes the specified set of IStateGroupNode objects from the list of child nodes if present.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void RemoveChildNodes(IStateGroupNode* const* childNodes, size_t childNodeCount); void RemoveChildNodes(IStateGroupNode::unique_ptr const* childNodes, size_t childNodeCount);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The set of IStateGroupNode objects to remove from the list of child nodes
The number of IStateGroupNode entries to read from the childNodes array
